message:
fix: re-emit SESSION_END after each ProcessInput so processing flag clears

sessionEndEmitted was never reset between inputs, so SESSION_END only
fired after the first turn. Subsequent turns left m.processing=true
forever, causing the status bar to show per-turn ↑↓ counts instead of
switching back to 'ctx:' when the model went idle.

Fix: reset sessionEndEmitted=false at the top of ProcessInput so each
call gets its own SESSION_END when complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
